positive: A central, stylized composition featuring a group of whimsical, friendly woodland creatures—a smiling fox, a deep blue owl, a gentle bear, and a fluffy rabbit—playing together in a vibrant, bioluminescent forest clearing. The art style should be a clean, modern graphic illustration, reminiscent of Scandinavian children's book art meets vintage etching. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and thick, clear outlines. The color palette should be harmonious and nature-inspired, using jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) offset by muted creams and forest greens. Composition should be perfectly centered and highly scalable for apparel print, with a bold, decorative border implicitly included. Studio lighting, high detail, whimsical, vector style, clean lines, perfect symmetry.
